note: Tech-heavy 4-name with a stated 'down 4% this month' concern -> anchors ~21-day lookback. Exercises return verification (computed vs stated 4%), market/factor/stock attribution, and the score-vs-price divergence verdict on a correlated tech book (likely factor/regime-driven => Transient or Fundamental depending on score moves).

Diversified cross-sector 5-name with a 'down this quarter' concern (no stated number) -> ~63-day lookback, no client figure to reconcile (tests the no-stated-number path). Mixed sectors => attribution should separate market/regime from stock-specific; expect a mixed/ambiguous divergence verdict with per-holding split.
